# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Build script to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Deployment command to run'
        required: false
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Validate build script path
        run: |
          SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          if [[ "$SCRIPT" =~ \.\./|^/|[\;\&\|] ]]; then
            echo "Invalid script path or characters detected"
            exit 1
          fi
          if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "Script file not found: $SCRIPT"
            exit 1
          fi
          if [[ ! "$SCRIPT" =~ ^scripts/ ]]; then
            echo "Scripts must be in the scripts/ directory"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Execute build script
        run: |
          chmod +x ${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}
          ./${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}
        timeout-minutes: 30

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: |
            build/
            dist/
          retention-days: 7

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: self-hosted
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}
    if: github.event.inputs.deploy_command != ''
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts

      - name: Validate deployment command
        run: |
          COMMAND="${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}"
          if [[ "$COMMAND" =~ rm[[:space:]]+-rf|mkfs|dd[[:space:]]|>\/dev\/ ]]; then
            echo "Dangerous command detected"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Execute deployment
        run: |
          ${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}
        timeout-minutes: 15

      - name: Notify deployment status
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Deployment completed with status: ${{ job.status }}"
